# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Update and upgrade dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y

# Install necessary service dependencies
RUN apt-get install -y apache2 && \
    apt-get install -y python3-pip && \
    apt-get install -y postgresql && \
    apt-get install -y redis-server

# Copy app and API server files
COPY ./webapp /var/www/html/
COPY ./api /opt/api/

# Install API server dependencies
WORKDIR /opt/api/
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Environment variables for PostgreSQL
ENV POSTGRES_DB mydb
ENV POSTGRES_USER user
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD password

# Start services (Apache, PostgreSQL, Redis)
CMD service apache2 start && \
    service postgresql start && \
    service redis-server start && \
    python3 /opt/api/app.py

# Expose necessary ports
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379
